recipes.title: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: Classic Roman pasta dish with creamy egg sauce, pecorino cheese and guanciale bacon
instructions: Cook the spaghetti in boiling salted water according to package directions until al dente
Meanwhile, cut the guanciale into small cubes and fry in a large pot until the fat has melted and the meat is crispy
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg yolks, pecorino and black pepper
Drain the pasta and reserve a cup of cooking water. Add the pasta to the pot with the guanciale
Remove from heat and add the egg mixture while stirring quickly. Add a little cooking water if needed
Mix well until a creamy sauce forms. Serve immediately with more cheese and black pepper

recipes.title: Pasta al Pomodoro
recipes.description: Simple and perfect pasta with fresh tomato sauce, garlic and basil
instructions: Cut the tomatoes in half and slice the garlic thinly
Heat olive oil in a large pan and fry the garlic until golden but not burned
Add the tomatoes, salt and pepper, and cook over medium heat for 15 minutes until the tomatoes have softened
Meanwhile, cook the pasta in boiling salted water until al dente
Drain the pasta and reserve a cup of cooking water
Add the pasta to the tomato sauce with torn basil leaves. Mix and add a little cooking water if needed
Serve with grated parmesan and fresh basil

recipes.title: Penne Arrabbiata
recipes.description: Spicy pasta in tomato sauce with garlic, chili pepper and herbs
instructions: Finely chop the garlic and chili pepper (remove seeds for less heat)
Heat olive oil in a large pan and fry the garlic and chili for 2 minutes
Add the peeled tomatoes (crushed with a fork), salt, and cook for 15 minutes over medium heat
Meanwhile, cook the penne in boiling salted water until al dente
Drain the pasta and add to the sauce. Mix well
Add chopped parsley and serve immediately

recipes.title: Fettuccine Alfredo
recipes.description: Classic pasta with rich cream sauce made from butter and parmesan
instructions: Cook the fettuccine in boiling salted water until al dente
Meanwhile, melt butter in a large pan over medium heat
Add cream and bring to a gentle boil
Drain the pasta and reserve a cup of cooking water
Add the pasta to the pan with the sauce. Remove from heat
Add parmesan and season with nutmeg, salt and pepper. Mix until the sauce is creamy
Add a little cooking water if the sauce is too thick. Serve immediately

recipes.title: Cacio e Pepe
recipes.description: Minimalist Roman pasta with pecorino cheese and black pepper
instructions: Cook the pasta in boiling salted water until al dente
Toast freshly ground black pepper in a dry pan for one minute
Reserve 2 cups of pasta cooking water before draining
Add a cup of cooking water to the pepper in the pan
Drain the pasta and add to the pan
Add grated pecorino and start mixing quickly
Gradually add more cooking water while stirring until a creamy sauce forms
Serve immediately with more pecorino and pepper

recipes.title: Pasta alla Norma
recipes.description: Sicilian dish with fried eggplant, tomatoes and salted ricotta
instructions: Cut eggplants into cubes, salt them and let sit for 20 minutes. Rinse and dry
Fry eggplant cubes in olive oil until golden. Drain on paper towel
In the same oil, fry chopped garlic until golden
Add crushed tomatoes and cook for 15 minutes. Add basil
Cook the pasta until al dente
Mix pasta with tomato sauce and fried eggplant
Serve with grated or crumbled ricotta salata and basil leaves

recipes.title: Pasta al Pesto Genovese
recipes.description: Pasta with fresh pesto made from basil, pine nuts and parmesan
instructions: Grind basil, pine nuts and garlic in a food processor
Add parmesan and olive oil gradually while blending until a smooth paste forms
Season with salt to taste
Cook the pasta in boiling salted water until al dente
Reserve a cup of cooking water. Drain the pasta
Mix pasta with pesto. Add a little cooking water to achieve a creamy texture
Serve with additional parmesan and fresh basil leaves

recipes.title: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
recipes.description: Simple and perfect spaghetti with garlic, olive oil and chili pepper
instructions: Cook spaghetti in boiling salted water until al dente
Meanwhile, slice garlic very thinly
Heat olive oil in a large pan, add garlic and chili flakes
Fry over low heat until garlic is light golden (don't burn!)
Reserve a cup of pasta cooking water
Drain the pasta and add to the pan with garlic
Add a little cooking water and chopped parsley. Mix well
Serve immediately with optional parmesan

recipes.title: Pasta alla Gricia
recipes.description: Carbonara without eggs - guanciale, pecorino and black pepper
instructions: Cut guanciale into cubes and fry until crispy and fat has melted
Cook the pasta in boiling salted water until al dente
Reserve 2 cups of cooking water
Drain the pasta and add to the guanciale with a cup of cooking water
Add pecorino and black pepper, mix quickly
Add more cooking water until you get a creamy sauce
Serve immediately with more pecorino and pepper

recipes.title: Pasta e Fagioli
recipes.description: Rich Italian soup with pasta and beans
instructions: Finely chop onion, carrot and celery
Fry vegetables in olive oil until soft
Add chopped garlic and fry for another minute
Add tomatoes, beans, broth and rosemary
Bring to a boil, reduce heat and cook for 25 minutes
Blend part of the soup (about 1/3) to create a thicker texture
Add pasta and cook until al dente
Serve with parmesan and olive oil

recipes.title: Pasta alla Puttanesca
recipes.description: Pasta with rich tomato sauce, olives, capers and anchovies
instructions: Cut olives in half and coarsely chop capers
Heat olive oil and fry chopped garlic and anchovies until anchovies dissolve
Add chili, crushed tomatoes, olives and capers
Cook for 15 minutes over medium heat
Meanwhile, cook spaghetti until al dente
Drain and add to the sauce
Mix well and serve with parsley

recipes.title: Tagliatelle al Ragù
recipes.description: Homemade pasta with authentic Bolognese meat sauce
instructions: Finely chop onion, carrot and celery
Fry vegetables in butter until soft
Add ground meat and cook until browned
Add red wine and let evaporate
Add tomato paste, broth and milk
Cook over low heat for 3 hours, stirring occasionally
Cook fresh tagliatelle for 3-4 minutes
Mix with the sauce and serve with parmesan

recipes.title: Pasta con le Sarde
recipes.description: Sicilian dish with sardines, wild fennel and raisins
instructions: Cook fennel until tender. Reserve the cooking water
Fry anchovies in olive oil until they dissolve
Add sardines and cook for 5 minutes
Add fennel, raisins, nuts and saffron
Cook pasta in the fennel water until al dente
Mix with the sauce
Serve with toasted breadcrumbs

recipes.title: Orecchiette con Cime di Rapa
recipes.description: Apulian pasta with turnip greens, garlic and anchovies
instructions: Clean turnip greens and cut coarsely
Boil turnip greens in water for 5 minutes
Add pasta to the same water and cook together
Fry garlic, anchovies and chili in olive oil
Drain pasta and greens, reserve water
Mix with the garlic and anchovy mixture
Add a little cooking water and serve

recipes.title: Pasta all'Amatriciana
recipes.description: Roman pasta with guanciale, tomatoes and pecorino
instructions: Cut guanciale into strips and fry until crispy
Add chopped chili and white wine
Add crushed tomatoes and cook for 15 minutes
Cook pasta until al dente
Mix with the sauce
Serve with grated pecorino

recipes.title: Pizza Margherita
recipes.description: The classic Neapolitan pizza - tomato sauce, mozzarella and fresh basil
instructions: Mix flour, yeast and salt. Add water and olive oil and knead for 10 minutes until smooth dough forms
Cover and let rise for two hours until the dough has doubled in volume
Divide into 4 balls and let rest for 30 minutes
Preheat oven to 250°C (or highest) with a baking stone if available
Roll each ball into a thin circle. Spread tomato puree, tear mozzarella and distribute on top
Bake for 10-12 minutes until edges are golden and cheese is bubbling
Add fresh basil leaves and drizzle olive oil before serving

recipes.title: Pizza Quattro Formaggi
recipes.description: Indulgent pizza with four types of Italian cheeses
instructions: Prepare pizza dough according to the Margherita recipe
Preheat oven to 250°C with baking stone
Roll the dough into a thin circle. Brush with a little olive oil
Cut gorgonzola and fontina into cubes, grate mozzarella and parmesan
Distribute the four types of cheese evenly on the dough
Bake for 10-12 minutes until cheeses have melted and dough is crispy and golden
Sprinkle freshly ground black pepper and drizzle olive oil before serving

recipes.title: Pizza Napoletana
recipes.description: Neapolitan pizza with anchovies, capers and olives
instructions: Prepare and roll pizza dough
Spread tomato puree on the dough
Add torn mozzarella
Distribute anchovies, capers and olives
Sprinkle oregano
Bake in hot oven for 10-12 minutes
Serve with olive oil

recipes.title: Pizza Marinara
recipes.description: Simple Neapolitan pizza with only tomatoes, garlic and oregano
instructions: Prepare and roll dough
Spread tomato puree
Sprinkle thinly sliced garlic
Add oregano and salt
Drizzle olive oil
Bake for 8-10 minutes in very hot oven
Serve immediately

recipes.title: Pizza Capricciosa
recipes.description: Rich pizza with mushrooms, artichoke, olives and prosciutto
instructions: Roll dough and spread tomato puree
Add torn mozzarella
Distribute sliced mushrooms, cut artichoke
Add olives
Bake for 10 minutes
Add prosciutto in the last minutes
Serve hot

recipes.title: Pizza Diavola
recipes.description: Spicy pizza with spicy salami and chili pepper
instructions: Roll dough and spread puree
Add mozzarella
Distribute spicy salami
Sprinkle sliced chili pepper
Add oregano
Bake for 10-12 minutes
Serve hot with optional chili oil

recipes.title: Pizza Prosciutto e Funghi
recipes.description: Classic pizza with prosciutto cotto and mushrooms
instructions: Slice mushrooms thinly
Roll dough and spread puree
Add mozzarella and mushrooms
Bake for 10 minutes
Add prosciutto cotto
Bake for another 2 minutes
Serve immediately

recipes.title: Pizza Bianca
recipes.description: White pizza with rosemary and olive oil without tomato sauce
instructions: Roll dough and brush with olive oil
Sprinkle thinly sliced garlic
Distribute ricotta, mozzarella and parmesan
Sprinkle rosemary leaves
Drizzle olive oil
Bake for 10 minutes
Serve with black pepper

recipes.title: Risotto ai Funghi
recipes.description: Creamy risotto with mixed mushrooms, white wine and parmesan
instructions: Slice the mushrooms and cook in butter over high heat until golden. Set aside
Finely chop onion and garlic. Heat the broth in a separate pot
In a large pan, sauté onion and garlic in butter until translucent
Add the rice and stir for 2 minutes until it starts to toast slightly
Add white wine and stir until completely absorbed
Start adding hot broth gradually, ladle by ladle, stirring constantly. Wait for each ladle to be absorbed before the next
After 18-20 minutes, when the rice is al dente, add the mushrooms, butter and parmesan. Stir until creamy
Serve immediately with parsley and additional parmesan

recipes.title: Risotto alla Milanese
recipes.description: Yellow Milanese risotto with saffron and butter
instructions: Heat broth in a separate pot
Sauté chopped onion in butter
Add rice and stir for 2 minutes
Add white wine
Add saffron soaked in a little hot broth
Add broth gradually while stirring for 18-20 minutes
Finish with butter and parmesan
Serve immediately

recipes.title: Risotto al Nero di Seppia
recipes.description: Black risotto with squid ink and seafood
instructions: Clean squid and save ink sacs
Cut squid into rings
Fry garlic in olive oil
Add squid and cook for 5 minutes
Add rice, wine, and ink
Add broth gradually for 20 minutes
Serve with parsley

recipes.title: Risotto ai Frutti di Mare
recipes.description: Rich risotto with mixed seafood
instructions: Clean seafood
Fry garlic in olive oil
Add chopped tomatoes
Add rice and wine
Add broth gradually
In the last minutes add seafood
Serve with parsley

recipes.title: Risotto alla Parmigiana
recipes.description: Simple and rich risotto with parmesan and butter
instructions: Heat broth in pot
Sauté chopped onion in butter
Add rice and fry for 2 minutes
Add wine and wait for absorption
Add broth gradually for 18-20 minutes
Finish with plenty of butter and parmesan
Serve immediately with black pepper

recipes.title: Tiramisu
recipes.description: Iconic Italian dessert with layers of coffee-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream
instructions: Separate yolks and whites. Beat yolks with half the sugar until light
Add the mascarpone to the yolk mixture and mix until smooth
Whip egg whites with remaining sugar until stiff peaks form
Gently fold the whites into the mascarpone mixture
Mix coffee with marsala/amaretto. Dip each cookie for a second and arrange a layer in the pan
Spread half of the mascarpone cream over the cookies
Repeat the process: layer of cookies and more cream
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours (preferably overnight). Dust with cocoa before serving

recipes.title: Panna Cotta
recipes.description: Delicate Italian dessert - vanilla milk cream with berry sauce
instructions: Soak the gelatin in cold water for 5 minutes
In a pot, heat cream, milk, sugar and vanilla over medium heat until sugar dissolves (don't boil)
Remove from heat and add the soaked gelatin. Stir until completely dissolved
Strain the mixture through a fine sieve
Pour into glasses or lightly oiled individual molds
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours until set
Serve as is or unmold onto a plate. Garnish with fresh berries or berry sauce

recipes.title: Cannoli Siciliani
recipes.description: Fried pastry tubes filled with sweet ricotta cream
instructions: Make dough from flour, sugar, butter and white wine
Roll very thin and cut circles
Wrap around metal tubes
Deep fry in oil until golden
Make filling: ricotta, powdered sugar and chocolate chips
Fill tubes before serving
Garnish with pistachios and powdered sugar

recipes.title: Gelato Italiano
recipes.description: Creamy and natural Italian ice cream in various flavors
instructions: Heat milk and cream to almost boiling
Beat yolks with sugar until light
Gradually add hot milk to yolks while stirring
Return to pot and cook to 82°C
Remove from heat and add vanilla
Refrigerate for 4 hours
Churn in ice cream maker according to instructions

recipes.title: Affogato
recipes.description: Simple and perfect dessert - vanilla gelato ball with hot espresso
instructions: Place a scoop of gelato in a glass or bowl
Make fresh espresso
Pour hot espresso over the gelato
Add amaretto liqueur if desired
Serve immediately

recipes.title: Zabaione
recipes.description: Hot and airy Italian custard made from egg yolks, sugar and marsala wine
instructions: Place bowl over bain-marie
Whisk yolks with sugar
Add marsala
Whisk continuously for 10-12 minutes
Cream will expand and become creamy and airy
Serve warm in glasses
Optional: with berries or cookies

recipes.title: Sfogliatella
recipes.description: Neapolitan layered pastry with ricotta and semolina cream filling
instructions: Make semolina cream: cook semolina in milk with sugar
Cool and add ricotta, vanilla and candied fruit
Roll phyllo dough thin
Brush with melted butter between layers
Cut rectangles and fill with cream
Shape into cone form
Bake at 180°C for 20-25 minutes

recipes.title: Biscotti di Prato
recipes.description: Crunchy Italian cookies with almonds for dipping in coffee or dessert wine
instructions: Mix flour, sugar and baking powder
Add eggs and almond extract
Knead and add almonds
Shape into 2 flat logs
Bake for 30 minutes at 175°C
Cool for 10 minutes and cut diagonally into slices
Return to oven for 15 minutes (each side 7-8 minutes)
Cool completely. Will keep for weeks

recipes.title: Amaretti
recipes.description: Soft Italian almond cookies with bitter taste
instructions: Mix almond flour and sugar
Add egg whites and extract
Knead into smooth paste
Shape small balls
Place on baking sheet with parchment paper
Sprinkle powdered sugar
Bake at 170°C for 12-15 minutes
Cool and serve

recipes.title: Panettone
recipes.description: Milanese holiday cake with raisins and candied fruit
instructions: Make rich yeast dough
Knead well and let rise for 2 hours
Gradually add butter, sugar and eggs
Add raisins and fruit
Let rise again
Transfer to tall panettone mold
Bake for one hour at 170°C
Hang upside down until cool

recipes.title: Torta Caprese
recipes.description: Flourless Italian chocolate and almond cake
instructions: Melt chocolate and butter
Separate yolks and whites
Mix yolks with sugar
Add chocolate and almond flour
Whip whites and fold in
Bake at 170°C for 35-40 minutes
Cool and dust with powdered sugar

recipes.title: Crostata di Frutta
recipes.description: Italian tart with pastry cream and fresh fruit
instructions: Make shortcrust pastry from flour, butter, sugar and yolk
Refrigerate for 30 minutes
Roll out and place in tart pan
Blind bake for 20 minutes
Make pastry cream from milk, yolks and sugar
Fill baked tart with cold cream
Decorate with fresh fruit

recipes.title: Lasagne alla Bolognese
recipes.description: Rich and multi-layered lasagna with Bolognese sauce, béchamel and parmesan
instructions: Make Bolognese sauce: fry chopped onion, carrot and celery until golden
Add ground meat and cook until browned. Add wine and evaporate
Add tomatoes and cook over low heat for 45 minutes. Season with salt, pepper and oregano
Make béchamel sauce: melt butter, add flour and fry for a minute. Add milk gradually while stirring until thick sauce forms
Preheat oven to 180°C
In baking dish: layer of Bolognese sauce, lasagna sheets, béchamel, parmesan. Repeat 3-4 times
Top layer: béchamel and grated parmesan and mozzarella on top
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes. Remove cover and bake for another 15 minutes until golden
Let rest for 10 minutes before cutting

recipes.title: Ossobuco alla Milanese
recipes.description: Famous Milanese dish - veal shanks slowly cooked in tomato sauce and white wine
instructions: Season the shank slices with salt and pepper and coat in flour
In a heavy pot, heat olive oil and sear the meat on both sides until golden. Remove aside
In the same pot, fry chopped onion, carrot and celery until soft
Add white wine and evaporate to half
Add tomatoes, chicken broth and a rosemary sprig
Return the meat to the pot. Cover and bring to a boil
Transfer to oven at 160°C and cook for two hours until meat is tender and falls apart easily
Make gremolata: finely chop parsley, garlic and lemon zest
Serve the ossobuco with sauce from the pot, sprinkle gremolata. Excellent with yellow risotto or polenta

recipes.title: Saltimbocca alla Romana
recipes.description: Tender veal cutlets with prosciutto and sage
instructions: Place prosciutto and sage leaves on each veal cutlet
Secure with toothpick
Lightly coat in flour
Fry in butter for 2-3 minutes on each side
Add white wine
Reduce sauce until thick
Serve immediately with the sauce

recipes.title: Pollo alla Cacciatora
recipes.description: Hunter's chicken - cooked with tomatoes, mushrooms and herbs
instructions: Sear chicken pieces in olive oil
Remove and in the same pot fry onion
Add mushrooms and cook for 5 minutes
Add wine and evaporate
Add tomatoes and herbs
Return chicken, cover and cook for 40 minutes
Serve with polenta or bread

recipes.title: Vitello Tonnato
recipes.description: Cold veal with creamy tuna sauce
instructions: Cook veal in white wine, broth and vegetables for one hour
Cool and slice very thinly
Make sauce: blend tuna, anchovies, capers and mayonnaise
Dilute with a little cooking liquid
Arrange veal slices on platter
Cover with tuna sauce
Refrigerate for 3 hours before serving

recipes.title: Melanzane alla Parmigiana
recipes.description: Layered fried eggplant with tomato sauce, mozzarella and parmesan
instructions: Slice eggplants, salt and let sit for 30 minutes
Rinse and dry
Deep fry in oil until golden
In baking dish: sauce, layer of eggplant, mozzarella, parmesan, basil
Repeat layers
Bake at 180°C for 40 minutes
Let rest for 10 minutes before serving

recipes.title: Arancini Siciliani
recipes.description: Sicilian stuffed and fried rice balls
instructions: Cook rice with broth and saffron
Cool and mix with egg and parmesan
Make filling: meat, peas and tomato sauce
Shape rice balls with filling and mozzarella in center
Dip in egg and breadcrumbs
Deep fry in oil until golden
Serve hot

recipes.title: Pomodori Ripieni
recipes.description: Tomatoes stuffed with rice, basil and parmesan
instructions: Cut tops off tomatoes and hollow out inside
Cook rice halfway
Mix with basil, parmesan, garlic and olive oil
Fill tomatoes
Replace tops
Bake at 180°C for 35-40 minutes
Serve hot or cold

recipes.title: Polpette al Sugo
recipes.description: Italian meatballs in tomato sauce
instructions: Mix meat, breadcrumbs, egg, parmesan, garlic and parsley
Shape into balls
Sear in pan until golden on all sides
Make tomato sauce in pot
Add meatballs to sauce
Cook for 25 minutes over low heat
Serve with pasta or bread

recipes.title: Bistecca alla Fiorentina
recipes.description: Giant Florentine T-bone steak on the grill
instructions: Remove meat from refrigerator one hour before
Heat grill or cast iron pan very hot
Brush meat with olive oil
Grill for 5-7 minutes on each side (medium-rare)
Season with salt and pepper while still hot
Let rest for 5 minutes
Serve with olive oil and lemon
